node_types.description: De-identified, time-bounded patient case used to assemble clinical facts and clinician-reviewed treatment-plan recommendations. Extraction guidance: Create one node per clinically coherent person-and-time context; use CaseSnapshot when the state materially changes.

properties.name: case_id
properties.description: Recorded case id for this clinical case.

properties.name: encounter_time
properties.description: Recorded encounter time for this clinical case.

properties.name: age_band
properties.description: Recorded age band for this clinical case.

properties.name: care_setting
properties.description: Recorded care setting for this clinical case.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Recorded status for this clinical case.

properties.name: deidentification_level
properties.description: Recorded deidentification level for this clinical case.

node_types.description: Single reusable symptom branch. It replaces parallel classes such as symptom cluster, symptom feature, thought, behaviour, and functional complaint. Extraction guidance: Attach presence, severity, frequency, duration, onset, context, quote, and source confidence to ClinicalCase→Symptom. Do not create a separate symptom-observation node. Constraints: Severity, duration, frequency, and uncertainty are edge attributes—not new sibling types. A child exists only when it carries a distinct clinical meaning, intervention target, or guideline role. Each symptom uses one canonical parent path during extraction.

properties.name: concept_id
properties.description: Recorded concept id for this symptom.

properties.name: preferred_label
properties.description: Recorded preferred label for this symptom.

properties.name: definition
properties.description: Recorded definition for this symptom.

properties.name: coding_system
properties.description: Recorded coding system for this symptom.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Recorded code for this symptom.

node_types.description: Single reusable therapeutic-action branch. It replaces parallel classes such as treatment, intervention, therapeutic technique, CBT technique, and therapy method. Extraction guidance: Extract the deepest available leaf. The ancestor path retains modality → model → component → exact technique. Constraints: Use HAS_COMPONENT to assemble a multi-technique intervention; do not create duplicate hybrid nodes. Medication monitoring, contraindication, and treatment burden link to the intervention or action, not to a duplicate treatment class. Cultural and faith-sensitive details remain by reference in the companion KG.

properties.name: concept_id
properties.description: Recorded concept id for this intervention.

properties.name: preferred_label
properties.description: Recorded preferred label for this intervention.

properties.name: definition
properties.description: Recorded definition for this intervention.

properties.name: delivery_mode
properties.description: Recorded delivery mode for this intervention.

properties.name: target_domain
properties.description: Recorded target domain for this intervention.
